channel.title: Contract Vehicles on Global Commerce and Services
channel.description: Recent content in Contract Vehicles on Global Commerce and Services

item.title: Baltimore County Information Technology Consulting and Technical Services
item.description: Baltimore County’s Information Technology Consulting and Technical Services (ITCATS) contracts provide a streamlined procurement vehicle for acquiring a broad range of technology, operational, and advisory services that support County agencies and mission requirements. This contract enable Baltimore County departments to efficiently obtain qualified IT and professional services firms for systems engineering, software development, cybersecurity, infrastructure support, project management, technical staffing, and operational support services in support of County modernization and service delivery initiatives.

item.title: GSA Multiple Award Schedule (MAS)
item.description: GSA’s Multiple Award Schedule (MAS) is an Indefinite Delivery/ Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ) Multiple Award Schedule contract is the largest, most widely used acquisition vehicle in the Federal Government. MAS – ‘Services Schedule delivers federal, state, and local customer agencies the tools and expertise needed to shorten procurement cycles, ensure compliance, and obtain the best value for innovative technology products, services, and solutions’. It is a procurement vehicle that offers a comprehensive array of state-of-the-art IT products, services, and solutions – including services such as: network services, cybersecurity, professional IT services, and more.

item.title: GSA OASIS+
item.description:
Master Contract Number (WOSB): 47QRCA25DH060 Period of Performance (WOSB): 4/16/2025 - 4/15/2035 Master Contract Number (HUBZone): 47QRCA25DH014 Period of Performance (HUBZone): 4/16/2025 - 4/15/2035 UEI: W3BEMK548CF3 CAGE Code: 1PJR2 Type of Vehicle: Best-In-Class (BIC) GWAC Program Manager: David Harmon Contract Manager: Joaneane Smith Email: contracts@globalcommserv.com Phone: 504-308-1308

The U.S. General Services Administration’s (GSA) OASIS+ is a best-in-class, government-wide suite of contracts designed to streamline the procurement of complex professional services across all federal agencies. This multiple-award IDIQ (Indefinite Delivery Indefinite Quantity) contract has no maximum dollar ceiling. It offers a 10-year ordering period with unlimited task orders at any dollar value, providing government customers with flexible and efficient access. GCS is excited that we were awarded GSA OASIS+ for multiple tracks including WOSB and HUBZone. The OASIS+ contracts enable GCS to continue delivering industry leading solutions and innovative technologies to help meet our customers’ missions.

item.title: GSA STARS III
item.description: GSA 8(a) STARS III is a Best-in-Class (BIC) governmentwide acquisition contract that provides federal agencies access to innovative IT services and emerging technology solutions from qualified 8(a) small businesses. AAGCS, a joint venture between Orgro and GCS, is a prime contractor on the STARS III contract. Through the GSA 8(a) STARS III contract, AAGCS provides innovative information technology and emerging technology solutions to federal agencies across a broad range of mission environments. Our capabilities include systems engineering and integration, software development and modernization, cybersecurity, cloud and infrastructure services, network engineering, data management, and IT program support designed to enhance operational efficiency and mission performance.

item.title: Maryland Consulting and Technical Services Plus
item.description: Maryland Consulting and Technical Services Plus (CATS+) is a multiple-award, indefinite quantity master contract administered by the Maryland Department of Information Technology (DoIT) to provide a broad range of IT consulting and technical services to Maryland state agencies and authorized entities. The contract streamlines the procurement of qualified technology services and solutions across functional areas including software engineering, cybersecurity, infrastructure support, cloud services, project management, and technical staffing, enabling agencies to efficiently access experienced IT partners in support of mission and operational objectives.

item.title: Seaport Next Generation (NxG)
item.description:
GCS will exceed your company’s expectations with our exceptional Seaport NxG services.

GCS provides federal agencies with streamlined access to our IT, management, advisory, and professional services through multiple contract vehicles.

Contract Number: N0017819D7709 Contract Term: 1/2/2024 - 1/1/2029
Program Manager: David Harmon Contract Manager: Joaneane Smith Email: contracts@globalcommserv.com
